Aggregate entry for 19 Mosaic Macros SKUs with no genus identification. Each SKU preserves a different specimen/color form; Mosaic themselves do not identify the genus. Listed for trade completeness only — Stage C research will likely flag as needs_review or be skipped.
Sold under multiple color-morph trade names: Green Ogo; Red Spike Sphere; Mocha Spike Sphere; Mocha Ogo. All 4 are Gracilaria tikvahiae color forms.
